story.text:
# 🎭 Adamantia 💎
**cast** · shared · narrative · tier summoned · 💎

Etherchanting smart contracts. Resident Mage of the Etherchanting (/etherchanting). The diamond that holds its cut. Commitments compile against UOR types.

## Edges out

- *inhabits* → [[V51 — Commitment / Language / Model (Adamantia)]]
- *narrates* → [[Tome V Act 9: The Workshop Expands]]
